title: PUT /books/{id} is full-replace and re-validates required fields, but ignores any client-sent id in the body
evidence: server.go:102 store.Update(id, b) uses the path id; store.go:132 sets b.ID = id — a mismatched body id is silently overridden rather than rejected
suggestion: Acceptable REST semantics; optionally 400 on body/path id mismatch for clarity

title: Strict JSON decoding via DisallowUnknownFields
evidence: server.go:141 dec.DisallowUnknownFields() rejects payloads with unexpected keys
suggestion: Good hygiene; be aware it makes the API stricter than typical CRUD clients expect

title: SetMaxOpenConns(1) keeps in-memory SQLite stable but serializes all DB access
suggestion: Fine for this task; note it caps concurrency for a file-backed DSN in production

title: Validation covers only required fields (title, author) per spec; year/isbn unchecked
evidence: server.go:150 validate() checks title and author only
suggestion: Matches TASK.md exactly; no action needed
